macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: SpaceX’s third-generation Starship draws attention as a potential NASA lunar vehicle
items.summary: NewsNow highlighted SpaceX’s third-generation Starship as a notable tech and space development, with NASA potentially considering it for crewed lunar missions. The item was among the day’s most prominent technology headlines.

items.title: Google quietly rolled out a major redesign of Google Wallet
items.summary: A reported redesign of Google Wallet surfaced as one of the more significant consumer tech product updates from the last 24 hours. The change appears to be a substantial interface refresh rather than a minor patch.

items.title: Google and Samsung updates point to ongoing Wear OS changes
items.summary: NewsNow surfaced two Wear OS-related developments: Google replacing Tiles with widgets on some smartwatches and broader smartwatch platform changes following Samsung’s approach. These updates suggest continued iteration in wearable software.

items.title: Microsoft patched two zero-day flaws in Defender
items.summary: Microsoft issued security fixes for two zero-day vulnerabilities in Defender, making this one of the most consequential enterprise tech security updates in the past day. The patching effort is important for organizations relying on Microsoft security tools.

items.title: Over 5,500 GitHub repositories were infected in a supply-chain attack
items.summary: SecurityWeek reported a large-scale supply-chain compromise affecting more than 5,500 GitHub repositories, making it a major software and developer-infrastructure security incident. The scope of the infection makes it one of the most significant tech industry developments in the period.

items.title: Huawei unveiled a ‘Tau Scaling Law’ workaround for U.S. chip sanctions
items.summary: Huawei’s latest chip-related announcement was framed as a strategy to work around U.S. sanctions, underscoring continued pressure on global semiconductor competition. The development is notable for the broader hardware and geopolitics implications.
